blindspots: **Anthropic stake exact ownership %** — Not disclosed by ZM; estimated 0.6-1.2% post-dilution. Drives the $2-9B FV range. Resolution: ZM FY26 10-K Note on Strategic Investments or fair-value disclosure.
**AI Companion revenue contribution** — Not separately disclosed. "MAU tripled" is a usage metric; revenue $ unknown. Proxy: watch for mgmt breakouts on earnings calls.
**Online / SMB segment churn rate** — Aggregated into "Online" ~39% of revenue; cohort-level churn not disclosed. Secular decline rate is critical for bear-case modeling.

**Teams Copilot's specific ZM displacement rate** — Microsoft reports Teams MAU but not ZM-specific switching. External surveys (Gartner, IDC) publish episodically. Structural risk; no reliable real-time metric.
**Anthropic dilution trajectory** — Depends on future rounds (maybe Series E at $1T+) and whether ZM participates pro-rata. Each round without ZM participation = dilution of the stake.

**Zoom Ventures non-Anthropic fair-value composition** — FY26 MTM gains ex-Anthropic ~$500M aggregate; individual company-level marks not public (48 portfolio cos per CBInsights). Could include Perplexity or other AI infra plays.
**Anthropic IPO definitive timeline** — Rumored Oct 2026 per TechCrunch; actual S-1 filing date unknown. Confidential S-1 filing not visible on EDGAR until public.

**Yuan China-US regulatory risk** — No specific threat currently disclosed, but Chinese-American founder with 25% voting control is a dual-class + geopolitical overhang that could materialize (CFIUS-style concerns unlikely but non-zero).

noiseFilter: **Zoom Ventures non-cash MTM quarterly gains** — fluctuate with private-market marks; single-quarter swings <25% are NOISE. Structural only at IPO crystallization OR >25% quarterly swing on Anthropic mark.
**Analyst price target revisions <10%** — crowded coverage (22 analysts), most won't model the Anthropic stake or AI Companion monetization separately. Only react to analysts who break out SOTP.
**Daily / weekly stock price moves within 52-week range** — $69.15-$97.58 range; normal vol. Only react when price breaks below $70 (entry trigger) or above $97 (52W high breach).
**Quarterly revenue beats/misses <$25M vs consensus** — 2% of revenue; routine noise.
**CEO Yuan 10b5-1 programmatic selling** — pre-arranged trading plans; NOT a discretionary insider signal. Only discretionary buys or plan terminations are signal.
**FY27 non-GAAP EPS variance vs guide** — guide includes Anthropic MTM assumption that management cannot predict. GAAP will miss/beat on private-mark noise. Use cash-based metrics (FCF, OCF) instead.
**Headline P/E ratio (16.4x)** — includes $970M non-cash Anthropic MTM gain. Adjusted P/E is ~25.6x. Bulls who cite headline P/E are double-counting the hidden asset.
